name: Sponge Cake (Pan Di Spagna)
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter and line a 9- or 10-inch round cake pan with parchment paper.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, whisk the yolks with vanilla. Whisk in half the sugar and beat until very light and frothy, about 5 minutes.
3. Combine flour and cornstarch; sift once to aerate.
4. In a clean, dry bowl, beat egg whites with salt until they hold a soft peak.
5. Beat faster while adding remaining sugar slowly until egg whites hold firm peaks.
6. Gently fold yolk mixture into whites using a rubber spatula.
7. Sift flour and cornstarch over egg mixture in three additions, folding gradually.
8. Do not overmix the batter.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and smooth top.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes until well risen and firm when gently pressed.
11. Loosen edge with a knife or spatula, invert onto a rack, leaving paper attached.
12. Turn right side up; cool on a rack. Store in refrigerator up to 5 days or freeze.
